# Bug: <title>

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is, including the context and impact on users.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1 (e.g. expected redirection behavior, correct response payload, etc.)

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Fix implemented and tested locally
- [ ] Automated tests added/updated under tests/
- [ ] Code style and lint checks are passing cleanly
